# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?

<!-- Briefly describe the change. -->

## Type

- [ ] New question(s)
- [ ] Question correction (wrong answer / citation)
- [ ] Tooling / scripts
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] England & Wales law only (no other jurisdiction's rule as an answer).
- [ ] Every new/changed question has a verified `authority` (Act + section or
      case + neutral citation); no invented citations.
- [ ] Formal UK English; single best answer format with five options A–E.
- [ ] `questions/original_ew.json` is valid JSON.
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/export_knowledge.py` and committed the updated
      `claude-project/knowledge/02-question-bank.md` (if questions changed).
